title: How To Trigger Custom Action When Item Name Changes
excerpt:
I want to call a custom action when an item name changes. 
The only place I can find where that is used is in creating an integration webhook call. 
How can I do this?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to call a custom action when an item name changes.

The only place I can find where that is used is in creating an integration webhook call.

How can I do this?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
We don’t have a built-in trigger for this, so I’m moving this to the feature request category.

As a workaround, you can create a custom trigger that creates a “When item name changes” webhook programatically. Documentation here: Create a Webhook

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@dipro

Is there a way to add a description when creating a webhook via the API? I don’t see anything in the docs.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: There is now a custom trigger for “item name changed” if you hadn’t seen it.
